title: The Pickle Jar
description: The beginning of the end, submerge into the Jar
body:
# **Come one, Come all, enter the circus and Submerge into the Jar**

**do you grow tired of the world, wouldn't you rather live within a land of chaos and disarray?**

**to anyone zany enough, you've come to the right place.**

Here in the circus, we bring nothing but joy and mayhem to the audience with many carnival snacks such as, _pickles_, _peanut butter_, _pickle alfredo_, and much more to come.

We also have many materials to make powerful weapons as well as suits of armor to the loose screws of the carnival.

Don't forget to visit one of many zany villagers that are willing to offer their help in return for your promise to **become the strongest**.

Become one with the **Jar**, for we are always happy to put much more into **Jar** and bring much more havoc into this world.

Enjoy the carnival, and we hope to see you again in the next rally.
